procedure.title: EPA LSASD non-standard procedure validation excerpt

audit.review_notes: Pilot annotation produced from model draft, then self-corrected. Not yet independently annotated. See datasets/paper/annotation_batches/.

steps.label: Inform the customer in writing that a non-standard procedure will be used

constraints.text: Use this branch only when a non-standard sampling or measurement procedure is necessary.

steps.label: Document that the customer agrees with the non-standard procedure
Record the customer request and justification in the project file

constraints.text: Record both the request description and why the project required the non-standard procedure.

steps.label: Develop a validation plan with objective acceptance criteria and testing scope

constraints.text: The validation plan should address the objective, acceptance criteria, testing level, and peer review.

steps.label: Provide documented training before staff implement the accepted operating procedure

constraints.text: Document competency for each staff member assigned to implement the procedure.
